tekton
  • Reference

tekton

tekton provides a custom pkgdown template for tesselle packages. Please don’t use it for your own package.

Installation

You can install the development version from GitHub with:

# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("tesselle/tekton")

Usage

Make sure your _pkgdown.yaml contains:

template:
  package: tekton

To work properly, tekton requires the assets and templates in inst/pkgdown/assets/. Because of this, you should not set default_assets: false in your _pkgdown.yaml.

Links

  • Browse source code at
    https://​github.com/​tesselle/​tekton/​
  • Report a bug at
    https://​github.com/​tesselle/​tekton/​issues

    Author, maintainer

Dev status

tekton is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.

Site built with pkgdown 1.6.1.9001.
